summary:
The Visual Vaccine Monitor (VVM) assesses a vaccine’s response to heat by providing direct visual indications of potential degradation. This tool remains the gold standard among available options for measuring vaccine stability at elevated temperatures. \boxed{A}

The summary captures that the Visual Vaccine Monitor (VVM) is crucial for assessing how sensitive a vaccine is to heat based on clear temperature-related changes visible without complex equipment. It also reiterates why no other parameter matches its specificity and reliability according to existing standards.
